name: roadway-integrator
description: Wire up a customer codebase to send Roadway the IDs and CRM fields required for website-side marketing attribution.

interface.shortDescription: Set up Roadway attribution in your codebase.
interface.longDescription: Detects the CRM, analytics, auth, and billing stack in the current repo, then installs the Roadway tag, creates CRM properties/fields, instruments signup, and populates Stripe metadata. If the stack isn't compatible with this plugin, customers are directed to their Roadway rep.
defaultPrompt: Set up Roadway attribution in this codebase.
Detect my CRM and wire up the required fields.
Install the Roadway tag and instrument signup.
